channel.title: RSA - Tag - Str1d3r

item.title: Master Challenge - De1 CTF
item.author: Author
item.description: Master Challenge Overview This was one of the most interesting RSA challenges that I have solve till date. There are numerous points about this challenge that makes it so intriguing and unusual one of them being the hint (I will come to that later :p) One thing you would have noticed is how it seems that most of variables which have been used in the challenge script are not even acessible to the solver.
